title: Session.total_tokens, cumulative_usage, and turn_metrics maintained as parallel state
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
solid
## Location
src/session/mod.rs:93-101, 152-192
## Violation
Session carries three overlapping representations of token usage: total_tokens (u64 legacy), cumulative_usage (TokenUsage), and turn_metrics[].actual_usage (Vec<Option<TokenUsage>>). record_actual_usage updates all three; record_turn_estimate updates only turn_metrics. add_tokens updates only total_tokens. Whoever calls add_tokens bypasses cumulative_usage. The doc comment ('Total tokens used (approximate) - kept for backward compat') is the kind of YAGNI debt that compounds; nothing prevents future code from updating one and not the others, and getters expose all three.
## Mandated refactor
Delete total_tokens and add_tokens. Make total_tokens() a computed property that sums cumulative_usage.input + output. Migrate any persisted JSON via a serde 'default' or a migration helper. Document that turn_metrics is the source of truth for per-turn and cumulative_usage is the cached sum.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
